services.metaTitle: JP Rentals | Steel structures for industry
services.metaDescription: Assisted design, detailing, fabrication, and erection of steel structures for industrial buildings across Mexico.
services.heroImageAlt: Industrial warehouse steel frame under erection: trusses and bracing.

gallery.alt: Steel frame assembly for a multi-tenant industrial building on site.
Warehouse structure and mezzanine levels: steel and Losacero decking.

services.title: Structure
services.lead: Assisted design, detailing, fabrication, and erection with quality control and applicable codes for warehouses and industry.
paragraphs: We support the project from structural criteria and shop detailing through fabrication and site erection, with emphasis on schedule, safety, and documentation aligned to each client and site.
Our typical scope includes frames, trusses, bracing, mezzanines, and support steel for equipment or crane runways, coordinated with other disciplines and construction progress.
bullets: Detailing and fabrication with traceability and quality criteria.
Erection, alignment, and connections per project and applicable standards.
Coordination with roof, façade, and MEP to close the building volume.

services.metaTitle: JP Rentals | Roof and envelope cladding
services.metaDescription: Roofs, façades, and wall systems in commercial profiles (KR-18, R101, and similar) with field closure for industrial buildings.
services.heroImageAlt: Metal roof and wall cladding over an industrial steel frame.

gallery.alt: Sheet installation on façades and walls of an industrial plant.
KR-18 roof progress and envelope closure on a distribution center.

services.title: Sheeting & envelope
services.lead: Commercial profiles (e.g. KR-18), façade and wall R panels or as per design, with field closure.
paragraphs: We execute the envelope as an integrated system: slopes, fasteners, seals, and transitions to structure to reduce leaks and punch-list items at handover.
We work with profiles and finishes defined in the project (including KR-18-type roof layouts and R101 or other wall solutions), respecting coatings and ventilation criteria where applicable.
bullets: Commercial roof profile and lap per manufacturer and design.
Façades and walls in R or other geometry per specification.
Flashings, trims, and field joint details.

services.metaTitle: JP Rentals | Retrofit, strengthening, and mezzanines
services.metaDescription: Work on existing structures, mezzanines, Losacero, and upgrades with minimal impact on plant operations.
services.heroImageAlt: Structural work inside an existing warehouse shell.

gallery.alt: Mezzanine structure and Losacero integrated with the main building.
Structural erection and fit-out on a large-footprint facility.

services.title: Strengthening & mezzanines
services.lead: Interventions on existing structures, mezzanines, Losacero, and upgrades with minimal disruption to operations.
paragraphs: On operating plants we prioritize safe work windows, erection sequencing, and clear communication with production to add strengthening, supports, or new levels without compromising business continuity.
Mezzanines and Losacero-type solutions are engineered with load checks, supports, and connection detailing, ready for finishes and services.
bullets: Strengthening and repair of existing members per assessment and design.
Mezzanines and intermediate floors, including Losacero where applicable.
Structural upgrades coordinated with maintenance and operations.
